fungal.description: Derived from late blight resistance homolog R1A-3 in tomato. These genes help detect fungal pathogens and initiate immune response.
Helper NLR receptor that activates immune signaling and cell death after pathogen detection.
Pathogenesis-related protein produced during infection that helps inhibit pathogen growth.

bacterial.description: Recognizes bacterial effector proteins such as AvrPto and initiates immune response.
Forms a complex with Pto to activate downstream signaling pathways leading to bacterial defense.

disclaimer.text: These genes are curated from scientific sources and are used only for biological interpretation of the predicted class. They are not predicted directly by the model.
